prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: 夏目镜/Natsume Kagami from 永昼学园/Eternal Noon Academy, full-body character design, pure white background, character standing in the center, anime style, Japanese animation style, vibrant colors, no text, no symbols, no words.

夏目镜 / Natsume Kagami from 永昼学园 / Eternal Noon Academy, a young man with an extremely handsome and beautiful appearance, high intelligence, and a mysterious, melancholic aura. He has a tall, slender, and well-proportioned physique with pale, almost translucent skin that suggests an otherworldly fragility. His most striking feature is his short, silvery-white hair, styled in a slightly messy yet elegant way, catching the light with a soft glow. His eyes are a deep, profound grey, like mist-covered mirrors, reflecting a distant and complex inner world. His facial features are exquisitely delicate and refined: sharp jawline, straight nose, and thin lips usually set in a cool, detached, and slightly melancholic expression.

He is wearing the white uniform of Eternal Noon Academy, which appears crisp yet subtly surreal against his pale skin. The uniform fits his slender frame perfectly, adding to his elegant and somewhat ethereal presence. His overall demeanor is one of quiet introspection and immense, unspoken charisma, embodying a sense of being both present and absent, tangible yet dreamlike. The atmosphere around him is filled with mystery and a symbolic, abstract quality, hinting at the blurred lines between life, death, memory, and reality within the summer-horror setting. The art style is detailed anime, with a focus on clean lines, vivid yet slightly surreal colors, and a sense of poignant beauty., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

back.prompt:

No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
